mapper.insert: INSERT INTO contest_post ( contest_id, subtitle, poster_url, start_date, end_date, host_name, target, total_prize, first_prize, tags, past_winner_info, apply_url, category_id ) VALUES ( #{postId}, #{subtitle}, #{posterUrl}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{hostName}, #{target}, #{totalPrize}, #{firstPrize}, #{tags}, #{pastWinnerInfo}, #{applyUrl}, #{category_id} )
mapper.select: SELECT b.post_id, b.title, b.view_count, b.created_at, ct.category_name, c.subtitle, c.host_name, c.poster_url, c.start_date, c.end_date, c.target, c.total_prize, c.first_prize FROM board b JOIN contest_post c ON b.post_id = c.contest_id JOIN category ct ON b.category_id = ct.category_id WHERE b.board_code = 3 ORDER BY b.created_at DESC

SELECT b.post_id, b.user_id, b.title, c.subtitle, b.content, ct.category_name, b.view_count, b.created_at, c.subtitle, c.host_name, c.poster_url, c.start_date, c.end_date, c.target, c.total_prize, c.first_prize, c.apply_url FROM board b JOIN contest_post c ON b.post_id = c.contest_id JOIN category ct ON b.category_id = ct.category_id WHERE b.board_code = 3 AND b.is_deleted = false AND b.post_id = #{postId}

SELECT b.post_id, b.title, b.view_count, b.created_at, ct.category_name, c.subtitle, c.host_name, c.poster_url, c.start_date, c.end_date, c.target, c.total_prize, c.first_prize FROM board b JOIN contest_post c ON b.post_id = c.contest_id JOIN category ct ON b.category_id = ct.category_id WHERE b.board_code = 3 AND b.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY b.created_at DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
